---
name: Policy Resolution
about: Propose a policy-development or policy-resolution change
title: "[Policy] "
labels: policy
assignees: ""
---

## Issue or Opportunity

What policy problem should the party address?

## Proposed Direction

Summarize the policy idea in plain language.

## Sponsor Base

Who is sponsoring this proposal? List riding associations, commissions, or
member groups if known.

## Urgency

Is this intended for the next convention cycle, an emergency resolution, or the
long-term policy book?

## Evidence

List key evidence, consultations, or comparable practices that should inform
drafting.
